text: asherey-haish asher ׀ lo halakh ba'atsat resha'im uvederekh chataim lo 'amad uvemovshav letsim lo yashav
ki im betovrat yehva chefetsov uvetovratov yehege yovmam valayela
vehaya ke'ets shatul 'al-palegey mayim asher pireyov ׀ yiten be'itov ve'alehu lo-yibovl vekhol asher-ya'ase yatselicha
